title: lobelia reniformis
intro: Lobelia reniformis, also known as wild lobelia or lobelia, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a respiratory stimulant and a cardiovascular tonic. The health benefits of lobelia reniformis include its potential to relieve symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Lobelia reniformis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
